book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should be in the type of hotel
The hotel should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 5 nights starting from saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve hungarian food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves british food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 17:45 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 16:45
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
